findings.summary: Single-pin nets not flagged in connectivity_issues

incorrect.description: R1 and R2 are completely unconnected (no wires) — all 4 nets are single-pin. connectivity_issues.single_pin_nets is empty [] when it should list all 4 __unnamed_0..3 nets. This is a real connectivity problem the analyzer silently misses.

findings.summary: RC filter not detected despite bypass caps around TL072

missed.description: Design has a TL072 op-amp (IC1), bypass caps C1-C4, and resistors forming an audio mixer. The opamp_circuits entry is correct, but rc_filters is empty []. C3 (100nF) on the power supply and the input RC networks should produce at least one RC filter hit.

findings.summary: Crystal, regulator, and full 125-component BOM parsed correctly

correct.description: X1 crystal detected in crystal_circuits, AP2112K-1.8 detected in power_regulators, all 125 components with correct type classification including fuse (F1) and net_tie. dnp_parts=8 matches design intent.

findings.summary: unconnected_hierarchical reports a false positive for /ENABLE label

incorrect.description: The label '/0a43c989.../ENABLE' is flagged as unconnected_hierarchical, but it appears in the labels list as a hierarchical_label with coordinates — it is present on the sheet. The sibling sheet's '/79d06a01.../ENABLE' net is populated in the nets dict with 4 points, suggesting the ENABLE hierarchy is connected. This may be a cross-sheet resolution issue.

findings.summary: 66-component ColdFire dev kit correctly parsed with all component types

correct.description: All 12 component types identified (IC, capacitor, connector, resistor, inductor, switch, diode, jumper, ferrite_bead, transistor, LED, crystal), 7 power rails extracted, 101 nets found.
Correct footprint counts (94 total, 37 front/57 back, 86 SMD/1 THT), 87 vias, 47 nets, board dimensions 16.5x40mm, routing_complete=true, stackup extracted correctly.

findings.summary: Empty PCB handled gracefully with no false positives

correct.description: All statistics zero, board_outline edge_count=0, bounding_box=null, copper_presence warning correctly issued, silkscreen warnings appropriate.

findings.summary: copper_layers_used=0 despite F.Cu and B.Cu defined in layers list

incorrect.description: The PCB has 2 footprints placed on F.Cu (front_side=2) but copper_layers_used=0 with empty copper_layer_names. This is technically correct (no tracks routed) but misleading — the board clearly uses F.Cu for pads. A board with placed SMD components should report at least 1 copper layer used.
